title: 國一下第五單元：統計圖表與統計數據

runtime.nonRepeatPolicy: app.js stores recent quiz signatures in localStorage and re-rolls seed when a duplicate signature appears.
runtime.levelSplit: Advanced questions appear only for units that need flexible application; chapter quizzes keep them to about one third at most.

basic.purpose: Basic drills: confirm rules, definitions, and standard procedures.
guardrails: Numbers are generated by questions.js and answers are calculated from the same parameters.
Prefer familiar one-step or two-step rule practice.
